goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'monday' and should 'arrive by 19:00'.
The train should go to 'peterborough' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'parkside pools'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on monday and should arrive by 19:00
The train should go to peterborough and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called parkside pools
Make sure you get attraction type
